rulePrefixes.foundation: Installation, version boundaries, validator authoring basics, and collection or composition defaults
rulePrefixes.validators: Built-in validator families for presence, comparison, range, length, format, enum, predicate, and regex decisions
rulePrefixes.configuration: Messages, placeholders, property names, and property-path shaping for validation failures
rulePrefixes.execution: RuleSets, conditions, cascade behavior, validator inclusion, and dependent-rule execution flow
rulePrefixes.integration: Dependency injection, ASP.NET Core entrypoints, async validation flow, and ecosystem boundary choices
rulePrefixes.extensibility: Custom validators, reusable property validators, inheritance dispatch, context data, and exception shaping
rulePrefixes.runtime: Severity, error codes, custom state, and localization behavior that affect downstream validation contracts
rulePrefixes.testing: Validator black-box testing, test helper usage, and application-boundary integration coverage
rulePrefixes.upgrade: Current baselines, historical breaking changes, and version-compatibility decisions across major releases
